# Session Handoff

Updated: 2026-04-27

## Start Here

1. Read `CLAUDE.md` when using Claude Code, or `AGENTS.md` when using Codex.
2. Read `.stateful/config.yaml`.
3. Read `.stateful/workplan.yaml`.
4. Read `.stateful/session/handoff.md`.
5. Run `python3 scripts/stateful/status.py --tool <claude|codex>`.
6. Check `git status --short --branch` and `git log --oneline -10`.

## Current Position

Stateful has been installed. The next useful action is to customize the
workplan for this repository.

## Tool Transition

- Last tool: unknown
- Suggested next tool: unknown
- Active WIP: none

## Next Actions

- Run `python3 scripts/stateful/status.py`.
- Edit `.stateful/workplan.yaml` to add repo-specific tasks.
- Run `python3 scripts/stateful/validate-workplan.py`.
